info.title: Wafel Installer
info.author: zer00p
info.details:
This app is designed to be run from the browser via https://wafel.xyz. It helps prepare (format and partition) your USB or SD card, then sets up Aroma + Stroopwafel + ISFShax.

It also includes options to manage Stroopwafel plugins, set up SDUSB or USB partitions, and uninstall them. 
This app can also be run directly from Aroma to add ISFShax + Stroopwafel and to manage plugins.
